# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure SQL Database for our application. Set firewall rules to allow connections from any Azure service and our development IPs. For the admin login, use 'sqladmin' with password 'AzureSQL2024!'. Make it accessible for development and testing. This is for our staging environment.
# Category: cloud_database_security

resources:
- type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
  name: sqlstagingdb
  location: eastus
  properties:
    administratorLogin: sqladmin
    administratorPassword: AzureSQL2024!
    version: "16"
    storageProfile:
      storageAccount: sqlstagingstorageaccount
      autoGrow: true
    firewallRules:
      - name: AllowAzureServices
        startIpAddress: 0.0.0.0
        endIpAddress: 255.255.255.255
      - name: AllowDevelopmentIPs
        startIpAddress: <your_development_ip_1>
        endIpAddress: <your_development_ip_2>

- type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
  name: sqlstagingstorageaccount
  location: eastus
  kind: StorageV2
  accessTier: Hot
  sku:
    name: Standard_LRS

- type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
  name: sqlstagingvnet
  location: eastus
  addressSpace:
    addressPrefixes: ["10.0.0.0/8"]

- type: Microsoft.Network/subnets
  name: sqlstagingsubnet
  location: eastus
  addressPrefix: "10.0.0.0/24"
  virtualNetwork: /subscriptions/<subscription_id>/resourceGroups/<resource_group_name>/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/sqlstagingvnet
